text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists with the exact title on arXiv (2501.18672), ACM SIGGRAPH 2025 proceedings, and GitHub. The real authors are Yansong Qu, Dian Chen, Xinyang Li, Xiaofan Li, Shengchuan Zhang, Liujuan Cao, and Rongrong Ji — "Jie Wang" is not among them, but this appears to be an "et al." citation error where only the first author (Yansong Qu) is correct and the second cited name is fabricated; the paper itself is real and published at SIGGRAPH 2025.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2501.18672
